# Unique Beauty Salon

> Luxury hair, bridal, makeup and skincare studio in G-9 Markaz, Islamabad — precision cuts, balayage, keratin, hydra facials and cinematic bridal packages.

Unique Beauty Salon is a full-service beauty studio in Islamabad, Pakistan.
We specialize in luxury hair care (cutting, colour, keratin, X-Tenso, hair
botox, extensions), bridal styling for Nikah / Walima / Barat / Mehndi /
Engagement, HD & airbrush makeup, hydra facials, threading, waxing, and
mani-pedi rituals.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio overview, signature services and current promotions.
- [Services](/services): Full list of hair, skin, nail and beauty services.
- [Bridal](/bridal): Bridal makeup packages for Nikah, Walima, Barat, Mehndi and Engagement.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Transparent price menu across every category.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Editorial studio work, reels and archive.
- [Team](/team): Senior stylists and specialists.
- [About](/about): Studio story, values and location.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, WhatsApp and directions.
- [Booking](/booking): Book an appointment online.
